metadata.description: Curated extensions for Junie — the AI coding agent by JetBrains

extensions.name: php-engineer
extensions.description: PHP 8.x policy & pitfalls: strict types, enums, readonly, match, PHPStan discipline, and security. Catches the traps LLMs miss — type coercion, foreach-by-reference leak, readonly mutation through references, DateTime aliasing, PDO emulation mode.

extensions.name: laravel-engineer
extensions.description: Complete Laravel guide: Eloquent ORM, routing, Form Requests, API Resources, authentication, queues, events, testing with Pest/PHPUnit, and Spatie coding standards. Includes toolchain setup and post-generation quality pipeline.

extensions.name: context7
extensions.description: Up-to-date library and framework documentation via Context7 MCP

extensions.name: java-engineer
extensions.description: Java 21 language features, idioms, and coding standards. Covers records, sealed classes, pattern matching, virtual threads, streams, Optional, generics, exception handling, and naming conventions. Pure Java — no framework-specific content.

extensions.name: kotlin-engineer
extensions.description: Kotlin 2.x policy & pitfalls: coroutine-safety, Flow correctness, null-safety, API design, and build setup. Catches the traps LLMs miss by default — CancellationException swallowing, StateFlow leaks, GlobalScope misuse, KSP/kapt conflicts.

extensions.name: redis-engineer
extensions.description: Redis best practices: data structures, key naming, caching patterns, memory management, transactions, pub/sub, clustering, persistence, and observability.

extensions.name: spring-boot-engineer
extensions.description: Complete Spring Boot 3.x guide: REST APIs, Spring Data JPA, Spring Security 6, WebFlux reactive, Kotlin patterns, event-driven architecture, Resilience4j, Spring Cloud, and testing. Single skill covering the full stack.

extensions.name: sql-engineer
extensions.description: SQL and database migrations: Flyway/Liquibase, query optimization, indexing strategies, safe schema changes, and raw SQL best practices.

extensions.name: android-engineer
extensions.description: Senior Android engineer workflows: Kotlin-first, Jetpack Compose, MVVM, Coroutines/Flow, Room, Retrofit, Hilt, plus device orchestration via mobile-mcp with ADB fallback. Covers implement, debug, build-fix, test, review, and autonomous QA on emulator.
